title: Rename _set methods that are update-only operations
description: chat_contact_set, read_position_set, and presence_status_set are all update-only (the spec forbids create and destroy on these types). The _set suffix implies general JMAP set semantics but misleads callers. Rename to chat_contact_update, read_position_update, and presence_status_update to match the rest of the API surface (chat_update, message_update, space_update).
